overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a mountain trail through alpine forests, crossing a wooden bridge over a crystal-clear lake, and passing a broken dam with a small waterfall. The environment features dramatic rocky peaks, dense coniferous forests, and vibrant wildflowers under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain trail with wildflower meadows

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a rocky mountain path surrounded by alpine meadows and scattered coniferous trees, heading toward distant peaks

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain range forming the backdrop of the valley
dense pine and spruce trees covering the mountain slopes
steep gray rock formation alongside the trail
narrow winding path of compacted earth and gravel
grassy slopes dotted with red and yellow wildflowers

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide mountain trail with rocky peaks visible in the distance. The character walks along a dirt path bordered by wildflower meadows and scattered pine trees. A large rocky cliff face dominates the left side while the valley stretches ahead toward snow-capped mountains under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain trail approaching alpine lake

events.description: entering denser forest canopy creates dappled shade on the trail
first glimpse of alpine lake water visible through the trees ahead

agents.ego_description: descending through a denser forest section toward the lake shore, moving from open terrain into tree cover

entered.detail: turquoise mountain lake becoming visible through the forest canopy
thick overhead cover of pine branches creating shade

segments.scene_description: The trail descends into a denser forest section where the canopy creates shifting shadows on the path. The rocky cliffs give way to thick pine forest as the first glimpses of an alpine lake appear through the trees ahead. The lighting becomes more diffused under the tree cover while the character continues toward the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside path with wooden footbridge crossing

events.description: emerging from forest onto the open lakeshore with clear view of the water
stepping onto and crossing the wooden footbridge over the lake inlet

agents.ego_description: walking along the lake shore and carefully crossing a wooden footbridge over the clear turquoise water

entered.detail: rustic timber bridge with railings spanning a narrow inlet of the lake
boulders and rocky outcrops along the water's edge
mirror-like reflection of peaks on the calm lake surface

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the forest onto the lakeshore where the water stretches out to the right. The trail follows the water's edge to a wooden footbridge that crosses a narrow inlet. The character crosses the bridge, with clear turquoise water visible below and mountain reflections shimmering on the lake surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside trail with broken timber dam and waterfall

events.description: approaching broken dam structure with water cascading through the breach
pausing briefly to observe the waterfall before continuing along the shore

agents.ego_description: walking past a broken timber dam with cascading water, observing the waterfall before continuing along the rocky lakeshore

entered.detail: collapsed wooden dam structure with broken beams and debris
white water rushing through the broken dam into the lake below
scattered logs and broken planks from the destroyed structure

segments.scene_description: After crossing the bridge, the character encounters a broken timber dam where water cascades through the breach creating a small waterfall. The trail continues along the rocky lakeshore past the wooden debris of the collapsed structure. Mist from the waterfall drifts across the path as the character proceeds deeper into the mountain valley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from an open mountain trail through a dense alpine forest and along a shimmering lakeshore. It begins on a wide dirt path bordered by wildflower meadows and towering rocky cliffs, with snow-capped peaks visible under the bright midday sun. As the trail descends, the open landscape shifts into a thick pine forest where the canopy creates diffused lighting and shifting shadows before the first glimpses of water appear through the trees. The scene then opens onto a turquoise lakeshore, following the water's edge across a wooden footbridge that reflects the surrounding mountains on its surface. Finally, the path leads past a broken timber dam where water cascades through a breach, sending a light mist across the rocky trail as the camera proceeds deeper into the valley.
